title: Korean-Style Dosirak Tofu Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy Korean-inspired bowl filled with marinated tofu, crunchy vegetables, and spicy gochujang sauce.
instructions: Cook the dosirak rice according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and toss to coat. Let it sit for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat. Remove the tofu from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the tofu to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until golden brown and crispy.
In a separate pan, toast the sesame seeds over low heat, stirring frequently, until lightly browned.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked dosirak rice on the bottom, followed by the marinated tofu, sliced green onions, toasted sesame seeds, and cucumber slices.
Drizzle the remaining marinade over the top and serve immediately.
